data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for expense capture (meals, lodging for out-of-town work). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for expense capture but does not provide any evidence of its implementation or validation, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of expense capture functionality for meals and lodging being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
